jobs.title: HPCL Graduate Apprentice Trainee Vacancy 2026, Check How to Apply
jobs.salary_pay_scale: Selected Graduate Apprentice Trainees will receive a total stipend of ₹25,000 per month.
selection_process: Acceptance of the Apprenticeship Agreement on the NATS Portal
jobs.how_to_apply: Go to the HPCL Career Portal. Create a login by registering for a new account. After logging in, select the Engineering Branch. Fill in your personal and educational information. Select your Training State. Upload your photo and signature. Check your application preview carefully. Final Submit. Keep your application number safe.
jobs.jobs_info: HPCL Graduate Apprentice Trainee Vacancy 2026: Hindustan Petroleum Corporation Limited (HPCL) has released a notification for the Graduate Apprentice Trainee (Engineering) recruitment for the year 2026-27. This recruitment drive offers 358 training slots in various states across the country. Eligible candidates can apply online from July 15, 2026, to July 31, 2026. Selected candidates will receive a stipend of ₹25,000 per month during the one-year apprenticeship.

jobs.jobs_info: NIT Kurukshetra Vacancy 2026: National Institute of Technology (NIT) Kurukshetra has released a major recruitment notification for youth preparing to make a career in the field of research and higher education. Eligible candidates will be selected for a total of 19 posts of Junior Research Fellow (JRF). The application process for this recruitment is completely online, and candidates can apply till 31 July 2026 at 11:59 pm. Selected candidates will get ₹37,000 per month along with HRA. This recruitment will be done on a contract basis under the ANRF PAIR SAKSHAM Project.

jobs.title: Northern Railway ATVM Facilitator Vacancy 2026, Apply Now
jobs.how_to_apply: Visit the official Northern Railway website at www.nr.indianrailways.gov.in or the link below. Download the tender form and the document containing all terms and conditions. Fill out the application form accurately with all the required details. Submit your completed application in the designated tender box at the office by 10 August 2026. Ensure the submission is made strictly between 10:00 AM and 2:00 PM on the deadline date. Applicants must provide a refundable security deposit of Rs. 50,000/- for NSG-1 and NSG-2 stations or Rs. Rs. 25,000/- for other categories, payable to the Sr. Divisional Finance Manager, Ambala Cantt, via Demand Draft, Fixed Deposit, or Money Receipt. This deposit is refundable upon contract completion after adjusting any pending dues, but it will be forfeited if the facilitator expresses an inability to operate the machine after being engaged.

jobs.title: ICAR IARI Field Attendant Recruitment 2026, Check Eligibility Criteria & How to Apply
jobs.salary_pay_scale: Young Professional- Rs. 30000/-per month (fixed) Lab cum Field Attendant Rs. 15000/- per month (fixed)
jobs.how_to_apply: Download the form: Visit the official website or download it from the link below. Fill Form: Fill out the form carefully in block letters and provide correct personal, educational, and professional details. Attach all documents: Include self-attested copies of educational certificates, experience letters, fee receipts, and proof of age (Aadhaar, PAN, etc.). Interview: If the recruitment is based on an interview, bring all original documents with you to the interview. Reach the interview venue ICAR – Indian Agricultural Research Institute (IARI) Regional Station, Katrain, Kullu Valley, Himachal Pradesh – 175129 on 15 July 2026 at 10:00 AM with the completed application form.
